zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Breteuil II於大約1052年出生在法國諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓時，他的父親Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford34歲，母親Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford25歲。他於1079年與Adeliza de Montfort結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1130年1月12日在他的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Breteuil II于大约1052年出生在法国諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓时，他的父亲Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford34岁，母亲Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford25岁。他于1079年与Adeliza de Montfort结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1130年1月12日在他的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Breteuil II was born about 1052, in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford, was 34 and his mother, Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, was 25. He married Adeliza de Montfort in 1079. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 12 January 1130, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Breteuil II est né environ 1052, à Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Adeliza de Montfort en 1079. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 janvier 1130, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als William de Breteuil II um 1052 in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford 34 und seine Mutter Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford 25. Er hat 1079 Adeliza de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Januar 1130 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Breteuil II è nato il circa 1052 nel Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Adeliza de Montfort nel 1079. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 12 gennaio 1130, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Breteuil IIが約1052年にフランスノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトンで生まれた時，父Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Herefordは34歳，母Adelise de Tosny Countess of Herefordは25歳であった。1079年にAdeliza de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1130年1月12日に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 리e
ko.lifeSummary: William de Breteuil II(이)가 대략 1052년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 브레테우이-수-이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1079년 Adeliza de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1130년 1월 12일 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Breteuil II nasceu aproximadamente 1052, em Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Adeliza de Montfort em 1079. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1130, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.Liré, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire,: лирe, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Breteuil II родился около 1052 г. в местности бретеуил-сур-итон, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Wiilliam de Breteuil Fitzosbern 1st Earl Of Hereford было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Adelise de Tosny Countess of Hereford, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeliza de Montfort в 1079 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 12 января 1130 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

Se casó con Adeliza de Montfort en 1079. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 12 de enero de 1130, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.
